item.title: Can't beat the algorithm
item.description: I guess the algorithm makes all the calls... Edit: ...and it did in my favor for once! 1st time viral. Thank you my dearest imgurians, I have lurked for years and I really love the community here :) If you liked the video and want more or simply want to support me: https://www.youtube.com/@mikesorrentinomusic

item.title: WTF? Horse Sees Zebra
item.description:
Barrel racer Mikayla Murphy captured amusing footage of her horse Ginger’s reaction to seeing a zebra for the first time.
Later Ginger got to meet the zebra face-to-face. Ginger remained guarded, even though the zebra was very friendly. https://www.tiktok.com/@equinemik

item.dc:creator: muffingirlization

item.title: I did it!... Now what
item.description:
Y'all, I just graduated. With honors. I'm thrilled to bits, and in disbelief. I'm late diagnosed ADHD (30) and autistic (34). I struggled through school since I was a kid. I remember getting bad grades as far back as 4th grade. My first time at university, I graduated, but barely. My GPA was terrible. It took me 5 years, and I didn't even get the degree I'd intended to (rather, I flunked out of 3 programs, and took the "path of least resistance" after that, just To graduate with SOMETHING) It's amazing what can be accomplished when you better understand yourself and can find a way to learn that works WITH your brain, not against it. I've been applying for jobs since the start of my final semester, hoping I would have something lined up. I've applied to close to 200 jobs in that time. I haven't even landed an interview. I'm feeling a bit lost now and already disheartened. I know I just have to keep applying, but damn. Wish me luck, it's tough out there.
Doggo tax. This is Inara, slaying a dragon.
item.dc:creator: PlatypusInterrobang

item.title: New photos of my corset
item.description:
I made a leather corset recently and this model was super hyped to pose with it, but couldn't make it to the last event
Now after a long winter we had a chance to get a new photoshoot in an abandoned hospital and she was super hyped to do it!

item.title: Meme Dump plus two birds kissing
item.description:
No he just respawned
Bell Hooks is an influential feminist.
And in your 30s you can actually be what you’re interested in
What a vast improvement. Hopefully our cities can take inspiration from this
Am I pulling this off or do I need to pull this off of me?
Get a room you love birds!

item.dc:creator: DrElihuWhipple

item.title: Releasing stolen chaos back to the wild vol. 12
item.description:
Hello again
I'd like to dedicate this post to my friend John
Story time:
He looked out for me When I was a silly 19yo.
He'd give me rides to work since I didn't have a car and he did at the time
He'd invite me over to play video games and eat food when I was broke and starving
He was always the most upbeat lovable goofball you can imagine even though he was always in pain
Back pain, knee pain. both lead to surgeries that i have watched him recover from
After I moved away we only kept in touch intermittently. Mostly just life check-ins
Over the years he'd mention some struggles that I could tell he was downplaying.
Work:painful. Life:painful
Again recently he reached out telling me things had been falling apart.
I just want him to be able to get what he needs to get safe.
He opened up about some of his lived abuses.
As a fellow dependent, some bits hit deep.
May you never know the terror of being dependent on someone else for your everything while being tormented by them.
Abuse is abuse.
He deserves better
I gave him what I could. I just want to send good karma things his way as he did for me what feels like a lifetime ago.
There's a link at the bottom if anyone can roll him some coins so he can get home.
Here's to hoping.
Bob ross has been good for my nerves lately.
*Deep breath* and he needs it.
https://gofund.me/ef9adb58 Love you buddy! I hope you get safe soon.
@Layinginbed *most viral edit: wow! thanks for all the updoots. And a most sincere thank you to whoever you are that rolled Johnny boy so much kindness. May you be blessed with all of the love. ❤️ **FP edit: holy imgur batman. ?I cannot express how much it means to see so much love coming out of the universe. If you want an irl mini bob ross painting in the future, just ask. it's the best I can offer as a thank you.
item.dc:creator: fthne

item.title: This is why mercury is not allowed in an airplane
item.dc:creator: berkanee

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.description: Sometimes Panko tries to jump on the bean bag and doesn’t quite make it and I have to encourage him. You got this! You can make it buddy. We slowly get there. However if you are holding a treat in hand anything is possible for this dog.
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy
